name: Hamilton Lane Senior Credit Opportunities Fund (SCOPE)

issuer.name: Hamilton Lane (NASDAQ: HLNE) via Securitize feeder fund

auditor.name: Big Four (per Hamilton Lane fund administration)

regulator.name: US SEC (Reg D 506(c) accredited investor offering)

summary: Tokenized feeder fund offering accredited investors access to Hamilton Lane's $948B AUM senior credit strategy. One of the first institutional-grade tokenized private credit funds. Minimum investment reduced from typical $5M to $10K via tokenization. Significant precedent: a Tier 1 asset manager bringing a flagship fund on-chain via SEC-compliant Reg D structure.

sources.title: Securitize: Hamilton Lane SCOPE launch announcement
Hamilton Lane press release on tokenization partnership

underlying_asset: Diversified senior secured private credit; portfolio of corporate direct lending positions managed by Hamilton Lane.
reserve_composition: Feeder fund holds units of underlying Hamilton Lane Senior Credit Opportunities Fund.
secondary_market: Securitize Markets ATS (SEC-regulated alternative trading system); limited secondary liquidity typical of Reg D.
oracle_provider: Securitize as transfer agent reports NAV; no third-party on-chain oracle.
redemption_mechanism: Quarterly redemption windows subject to fund liquidity (typical interval fund structure).
upgrade_authority: Hamilton Lane fund management + Securitize as transfer agent.

timeline.event: SCOPE feeder fund launched on Polygon via Securitize
